prompt: Out of position on a connected board, several draws stay live but raising would overstate your edge. Choose the best action.
why_v1: Connected boards out of position often favor controlled calls when multiple draw paths keep the spot volatile.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The connected out-of-position read supports a call.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Start from the connected-board volatility: out of position with several live draws, calling controls the risk better than overstating the edge with a raise.
